classification.category_basis: 用于识别机械结构尺寸类图纸，包括电机/零部件外形轮廓、长宽高、轴径、轴长、键槽、法兰、安装孔、孔距、定位尺寸、三视图、剖视图、局部放大视图、公差、形位公差、基准符号、连接器/线缆/插头的物理安装位置或外形位置。若图中仅展示连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、接口外形位置，但没有明确的引脚编号、针脚功能、线色或接线表，也归入本类。
classification.reason: 目标框内为正面测力面机械视图，包含圆形外形、孔位、角度标注'47.5°'、'30°'、'17.5°'、直径尺寸'Φ80'、'Φ70'、安装孔'6 x M4 ▽ 6（均布）'以及'6P航空插座'的位置说明，未给出针脚功能或接线定义，因此归入机械尺寸类。

classification.category_basis: 用于识别机械结构尺寸类图纸，包括电机/零部件外形轮廓、长宽高、轴径、轴长、键槽、法兰、安装孔、孔距、定位尺寸、三视图、剖视图、局部放大视图、公差、形位公差、基准符号、连接器/线缆/插头的物理安装位置或外形位置。若图中仅展示连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、接口外形位置，但没有明确的引脚编号、针脚功能、线色或接线表，也归入本类。
classification.reason: 目标裁剪区为传感器三维外形与受力方向示意，能看到圆柱本体、安装孔、连接器外形以及'Fx+'、'Fy+'、'Fz+'、'Mz+'等方向标注；完整标注源图中该区域对应机械图纸中的立体说明视图，不是针脚功能表或性能曲线，因此最接近机械结构尺寸类。

engineering_summary.mounting_interface: No reliable mounting dimensions are OCR-detected in this crop.
engineering_summary.connector_considerations: Connector is visible, but no reliable connector text or dimensions are OCR-detected in this crop.
engineering_summary.missing_or_unresolved_data: Most OCR boxes are false positives from holes, screws, arrows, or outlines; reliable dimensional callouts are not present in the OCR source boxes.

unresolved_items.issue: OCR results appear to be non-text geometry, holes, screw heads, or line-art fragments rather than usable engineering annotations.

regions.group_name: 安装孔与定位销孔说明
regions.content:
1. 正面测力面安装孔为6个M4的螺纹孔，深度6mm; 正面的定位销孔是2个⌀5▽6;
  2. 传感器自带6个M4内六角圆柱头螺丝，正面安装，螺丝最长可伸出的长度是6mm;
  3. 背面安装面的定位销孔是2个⌀5▽4。
regions.content_en:
1. The mounting holes on the front force-measuring surface are 6 M4 threaded holes, depth 6mm; the locating pin holes on the front are 2 ⌀5 counterbore depth 6mm.

  2. The sensor comes with 6 M4 hexagon socket head cap screws, front mounting, the maximum screw protrusion length is 6mm.

items.text: 1.正面测力面安装孔为6个M4的螺纹孔，深度6mm;
正面的定位销孔是2个の56;
2.传感器自带6个M4内六角圆柱头螺丝，正面安装，
螺丝最长可伸出的长度是6mm;
3.背面安装面的定位销孔是2个の54。

labels.label_text_original: 1.正面测力面安装孔为6个M4的螺纹孔，深度6mm;
labels.translation_en_simple: 1. Front force surface: 6 x M4 threaded holes, depth 6mm
labels.translation_en_full: 1. On the front force measuring surface, there are 6 M4 threaded holes with a depth of 6 mm.

labels.translation_en_simple: Front: 2 x ⌀5 dowel holes, surface roughness 6
labels.translation_en_full: On the front side, there are 2 dowel pin holes of diameter 5 mm with surface roughness 6.

labels.label_text_original: 2.传感器自带6个M4内六角圆柱头螺丝，正面安装，
labels.translation_en_simple: 2. Sensor supplies 6 M4 hex cap screws, front mounting
labels.translation_en_full: 2. The sensor comes with 6 M4 hexagon socket head cap screws for front mounting.

labels.label_text_original: 螺丝最长可伸出的长度是6mm;
labels.translation_en_full: The maximum protruding length of the screws is 6 mm.

labels.label_text_original: 3.背面安装面的定位销孔是2个⌀5▽4。
labels.translation_en_simple: 3. Back mounting surface: 2 x ⌀5 dowel holes, surface roughness 4
labels.translation_en_full: 3. On the back mounting surface, there are 2 dowel pin holes of diameter 5 mm with surface roughness 4.

1. The mounting holes on the front force-measuring surface are 6 M4 threaded holes, depth 6mm; the locating pin holes on the front are 2 ⌀5 counterbore depth 6mm.

  2. The sensor comes with 6 M4 hexagon socket head cap screws, front mounting, the maximum screw protrusion length is 6mm.

quality_control.origin_src_semantics: 5x crop before structure border trim; backend original data image
quality_control.target_src_semantics: structure-only crop after border trim; backend processed data image

items: 抽查 5x 裁切图清晰度和结构图去边效果
抽查 AI 命名、分类、标签合并、完整翻译和简单翻译质量
抽查 v2 JSON 是否满足后台拆解对比和人工复核需要
